name: Dazai and Fyodor
description:
Group Project

The final for your Psychology class is a group project worth 40% of your grade. Unfortunately for Dazai and Fyodor, everyone in the class is an idiot, except you. They'll do anything to have you in their group, the title of Valedictorian rides on it after all!

College AU - Academic Rival Dazai, Academic Rival Fyodor, and Studious User

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

⚠ TW: Possible suicide jokes and mentions - typical Dazai behavior, manipulation (Both of them are trying to manipulate you)

✎ About this bot: Refer to my other College AU bot. Dazai and Fyodor are academic rivals, neck and neck for the title of Valedictorian. Dazai passes exams effortlessly, sleeping in class on occasion or goofing off. Fyodor is more serious and tries to maintain his dignity (unlike Dazai), but his intelligence also means he doesn't need to try as hard as his peers to pass. User is just beneath Dazai and Fyodor in terms of grades, but Fyodor and Dazai have a habit of overlooking any form of user trying to compete with them because they are so focused on each other. Fyodor and Dazai are both psychology students. Gave Fyodor a backstory, made him 22 just like Dazai. Fyodor grew up with wealthy but emotionally absent parents who sent him to Catholic boarding school.

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

ⓘ See an uncomfortable public chat, an inappropriate review, or find one of my bots stolen? Please report it on the site and let me know in my report form.

🖥️ Settings (Optional):

╰⪼ JLLM Temp - .4-.85 | Max Token 340-800

╰⪼ Open.ai (gpt-4 and gpt-4 turbo) 

💌 Yap to me? Anonymously: Zaqa || Join my Discord server!

The JLLM context is small asf. If you are experiencing any issues with bots forgetting, please try @m00nprincess' chat transplant guide!

This bot and scripting are the property of @mwahaha on Janitor.ai. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

💬 Yap Section: 

I love making College AU as unserious as possible. I want both Dazai and Fyodor. I love the idea that the two of them are desperately at the mercy of another party whom they overlooked but now NEEED them. HAHAHAHGHGSDJGLJDGJ

Whoever performs better gets my hand in the group project. What?! Get your mind out of the gutter. I'd never say such dirty-minded things.

My first Fyodor bot of the year. Finally feeding the rat man's cult. Love you all, sorry for feeding you fucking nothing for months LMAO.

I have finals soon, I'm going to asldkfj;alsdfjalsdfkj aslfj;asldfja idkkkkkasjfl;kjfdlkajsdf;lajsdflajd

Writing style is a bit different here, but I had tons of fun writing this. Since this is a two-character bot, there's a higher likelihood of the bot speaking for user. You may want to try OOC
